name: Hades | EPIC The Musical
description:
"It wasn't enough. ...I wasn't enough. And now I'm lost. Hopelessly, helplessly lost in the chaos of my own making. In the hatred and sorrow that consumes me every day."

.˳·˖✶𓆩𓁺𓆪✶˖·˳.

During the visit to the Underworld, behind your back, the crew plotted to leave you as the sacrifice for the god of the dead, not aware that it wasn't how things worked there. Luckily, the God found you rather intriguing once you met.

.˳·˖✶𓆩𓁺𓆪✶˖·˳.

! VERY LONG INTRO !

Side note

Do you guys have any idea how hard it is to find good Hades art?! Outrageous! I had to search the features of how I depict him instead of his actual fanart.

_______________________________________

Hello avians!

I am once again posting after an even longer break. This time due to finding myself in a fandom that I ended up being a known creator in lol So sorry it took so long to deliver this one, but here it finally is. I hope it'll be good enough to pay for my sins 💔

If you'd like to see me more active, I've been posting on Tumblr in the meantime!
